hero.subtitle: Turn one idea into every content format.

visual_demo.heading: One source of expertise. Six points of presence.

modules.heading: Content has evolved. Your tools should too.
modules.subheading: Publishing alone is not enough anymore. Platform algorithms reward consistency, topical authority, and behavioral signals. PRIZMA builds the formats you need from a single idea, each one tuned to its channel.

items.name: Post
items.desc: Authority, made visible. A well-crafted post positions the expert in the feed and earns trust over time — not just a one-time impression.

items.name: Reel
items.desc: Short-form video that carries real expertise. Algorithms distribute it organically. The most effective way to reach a new audience without paid media.

items.name: Carousel
items.desc: Complex ideas, broken down clearly. Carousels earn saves and shares. The kind of content people bookmark and come back to.

items.name: Article
items.desc: Long-form content built for search. PRIZMA maps real queries, applies SEO and GEO logic, and structures articles that rank and hold attention.

items.name: Avatar
items.desc: The expert, present every day — without filming. An AI avatar delivers their voice and likeness in video format on a continuous basis.

items.name: Repost
items.desc: One piece of content, distributed everywhere. Tone, length, and format adapted per channel — the core message stays intact.

why.heading: Not a content generator. An intelligent content system.
why.text: Most tools generate text and stop there. PRIZMA goes further: it reads audience behavior, factors in SEO and GEO signals, tracks what performs, and refines over time. Every piece is shaped into the real voice of an expert. No robotic tone, no generic phrasing. The final call is always yours.

stats.label: more formats from a single idea
built into every piece of content
in the loop. Full control is yours

items.title: Experts and founders
items.desc: You have the knowledge. PRIZMA turns it into a consistent presence across every platform — no copywriter, no film crew, no compromise on your voice.

items.title: Marketing teams
items.desc: Six times the output, same team size. Every format is algorithm-ready. Organic growth without growing the budget.

items.title: Agencies
items.desc: Run multiple client brands from one system. Each brand keeps its distinct voice. No extra headcount needed.

items.title: Personal brands
items.desc: Show up everywhere, every day — without being everywhere yourself. PRIZMA keeps your expert presence active while you focus on your work.

steps.title: Topic
steps.desc: You provide a topic, idea, or expert perspective

steps.title: PRIZMA
steps.desc: AI researches it, applies SEO and GEO signals, and produces the selected formats

steps.title: You review
steps.desc: You check the output — nothing goes out without your approval

steps.title: Published
steps.desc: Content is distributed automatically across all platforms

showcase.heading: See it in practice.
showcase.subtitle: One expert idea. Three finished pieces, ready to publish.

reviews.text: We used to build content automation on Make — webhooks, workarounds, duct tape. It worked, but every update broke something, and maintenance ate up our time. We switched to PRIZMA and just exhaled. Everything in one place, stable, nothing to fix. Now we focus on clients, not on tech.
reviews.name: Dmitry Morgunov

reviews.text: First impression — honestly, amazing. A post went out on its own, without me lifting a finger. I opened the channel and everything was already there. Photo, text, all on point. Now I just work with clients, and the content runs itself.
reviews.name: Galina Veretennikova

reviews.text: Managers drop tours into Telegram, and everything spreads across social media on its own. TikTok, Instagram, everywhere. We used to have a dedicated person just for that. Now it simply takes no time.
reviews.name: Sergiy Kovalchuk

roadmap.heading: Where PRIZMA is heading
roadmap.subtitle: From content automation to a self-learning system that improves your publishing results on its own
